goal: Find one or more new orthogonal signals that independently add informational value and improve the base system without cannibalizing it.
global_constraints: Base system active-signal-v1@1 is frozen — never modify its rules, thresholds, hours, days, or execution logic.
Only genuinely new signal classes are allowed — no retuning, permutation, or filter relaxation of existing base inputs.
Every hypothesis must pass the full funnel: standalone → stability → integration → cannibalization → final report.
No brute-force parameter search; use small logical grids only.
All negative, neutral, and positive results must be recorded in research memory.
Cannibalism must be explicitly measured before any promotion.

slices.title: Интеграция с active-signal-v1@1
slices.hypothesis: Measure each surviving candidate's real incremental value on top of the unchanged base system.
slices.objective: Measure each surviving candidate's real incremental value on top of the unchanged base system.
success_criteria: Full integration picture exists for every standalone candidate.
evidence_requirements: Full integration picture exists for every standalone candidate.

slices.title: Cannibalization, ownership и new-entry proof
slices.hypothesis: Prove that each remaining signal adds genuinely new entries rather than parasitizing on the base.
slices.objective: Prove that each remaining signal adds genuinely new entries rather than parasitizing on the base.
success_criteria: Direct evidence exists showing which candidates genuinely expand the system.
evidence_requirements: Direct evidence exists showing which candidates genuinely expand the system.

slices.title: Walk-forward и финальная валидация финалистов
slices.hypothesis: Submit every finalist to stricter walk-forward validation and pairwise compatibility checks.
slices.objective: Submit every finalist to stricter walk-forward validation and pairwise compatibility checks.
success_criteria: Walk-forward is completed for all finalists with clear verdicts.
evidence_requirements: Walk-forward is completed for all finalists with clear verdicts.
